findings.description: The source `要求` h2 section contains 3 h3 subsections (実装済み, 未実装, 未検討) with substantial content (well over 2000 chars combined plain text), but the knowledge file maps all three to a single section s3 without splitting. Per V3 rules, when an h2 has ≥2000 chars and h3 subsections exist, the knowledge file should split them into separate sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST h3 headings under 要求: `実装済み` (========), `未実装` (========), `未検討` (========). Each subsection contains 8–15 bullet items.
